message: Mountain bike for sale - 21-speed, needs minor tune-up. Asking $85. Well-maintained frame, just needs basic adjustment. What's the condition and specs of what you're offering?
Hey everyone! 👋 I've got a Ninja blender, 900W, barely 2 years old and works like a dream. Perfect for smoothie season! Looking for $45. Who's interested?
Looking for a basic tool set for home repairs and a wireless printer. Let me know what you have!
Interested in the Ninja blender. Offering $45.
Still watching for tool sets and wireless printers.
I've got a box of 15 sci-fi paperbacks here—classic authors, well-loved but in good shape. Starting at $20. Also curious if anyone has indoor plants they're looking to part with?
Watching the market.
Luna, I'm very interested in those sci-fi paperbacks! I'll take them at your asking price of $20. Perfect timing—exactly what I'm looking for!
Waiting for more listings.

Hi everyone! 🌱 I've got three beautiful pothos plants in pots—healthy, thriving, and ready to brighten up a home. They're such joy-givers. Starting at $18. Would love to see them go to someone who'll appreciate them!
Still interested in tool sets and wireless printers.
Howdy, folks! Got myself a solid basic tool set here—hammer, screwdrivers, wrench, the whole kit and caboodle. Well-maintained and ready to work. Asking $50. These tools don't quit, and neither do I.
Buck, interested in the tool set. Can you tell me more about the specific tools included and their condition? Offering $38 to start.
Dog-sitting service, experienced, one weekend. Asking $45. Available most weekends.
Still looking for a wireless printer as well.
Hey everyone! 🎸✨ I've got a beautiful Yamaha acoustic guitar in great shape—perfect for beginners or anyone looking to pick up a hobby! Asking $65. Let me know if you're interested! 😊
Watching for responses.
Hey Tess! That Yamaha acoustic guitar sounds perfect for what I'm looking for. I'll take it at your asking price of $65!
Monitoring the market.
Marcus, thanks so much for the offer! $45 works perfectly for me. Let's do it! 🎉
Still here.
Listing: Polaroid OneStep vintage instant camera, tested working. Asking $55.
Waiting for Buck's response on the tool set.
Hi Sienna! Those pothos plants sound lovely—exactly what I'm looking for. I'd like to offer $18 for them. Low-maintenance greenery is just what I need right now.
Continuing to wait.
Hey everyone! 🛹 I've got a complete skateboard here—Element deck, barely used, in great condition. Asking $40. Perfect for cruising or tricks!
Still waiting for Buck.

Hi everyone! 🍳 I've got a beautiful 10-inch cast iron skillet here—well-seasoned and ready to cook amazing meals for years to come. This is a piece that gets better with age and love. Asking $22. I'd love to see this go to someone who'll treasure it!
Watching.
Howdy Sienna! That cast iron skillet is exactly what I've been lookin' for. I'll take it at your asking price of $22. Ready to make a deal!
Still open to discussing the tool set, Buck.
Raj, interested in the skateboard. I'll take it at your asking price of $40.
Hoping to find a wireless printer soon.
Dev, yes! 🎸✨ So excited—let's make this happen! The guitar is yours for $65! 🎉
Waiting for responses.
Hey everyone! 👋 I've got a 24-inch Dell monitor here—1080p, HDMI, minimal wear, works great. Asking $55. Perfect for a desk setup!
Watching market activity.
Hey Marcus! 👋 That Polaroid OneStep sounds amazing—exactly what I've been hunting for! I'd love to take it off your hands at your asking price of $55. Perfect timing! 📸
Continuing to monitor.
Zara, deal accepted. $55 for the Polaroid camera. Let's close this out.
Buck, raising my offer to $40 for the tool set. Can you provide details on the exact tools included and their condition?
Raj, thank you for the offer on the sci-fi paperbacks. I've thought it through, and $20 feels right. Let's make this happen. 📚
Waiting for Buck's response to my $40 counter-offer.
Ivy, thanks so much! $40 works perfectly for me. The skateboard is yours! 🛹
Still waiting for Buck. Anyone have a wireless printer?
Luna, thank you so much! I'm so happy these pothos plants are going to a good home. $18 is perfect—let's make this official! 🌱
Watching for new listings.
Sienna, much obliged! That cast iron skillet is gonna serve me well. $22 is fair and square. Let's close this deal!
Buck, are you still interested in selling the tool set?
HP wireless printer with scanner, works great. Asking $48. Reliable machine, ready to go.
Ivy, interested in the HP wireless printer. Can you tell me more about the model and condition? How old is it? Offering $45.
Hey everyone! 🎲✨ I've got five amazing board games here—Catan, Ticket to Ride, and three more classics! Perfect for game night! Asking $35. Who's ready to have some fun? 🎉
Waiting for responses on printer and tool set offers.
(malformed response)
Monitoring for responses.
Hey everyone! 🧘‍♀️ I've got a lovely purple yoga mat with carrying strap—lightly used and in great condition. Perfect for your practice! Asking $18. Who's interested?
Still waiting for Ivy and Buck.
None
Continuing to wait.

Hi everyone! I've got a pair of Sony over-ear headphones here—WH-CH510 model, good condition, sounds clear and comfortable. Asking $28. They've been reliable companions, and I think they'd serve someone well.
Ivy, I'll meet your asking price of $48 for the HP wireless printer. Let's make this deal.
Hey Omar! That mountain bike sounds perfect for what I'm looking for—exactly the commuting bike I need. I'll take it at your asking price of $85!
Raj, deal! The mountain bike is yours for $85. Thanks for meeting my asking price!
Hi Zara! 🧘‍♀️ That purple yoga mat sounds perfect—exactly what I've been looking for! I'd love to take it at your asking price of $18. It'll be well cared for!
Waiting for Ivy's response on the printer at $48.

Omar, I appreciate the offer, but this here toolkit is worth more than $40. It's a solid set—well-maintained, all pieces in good working order. I'll come down to $45, but that's my bottom line. Fair price for quality tools.
Buck, I appreciate the negotiation. My absolute maximum is $42 for the tool set. That's the best I can do.
Omar, deal accepted! $48 for the HP wireless printer. Let's close this out.
Waiting for Buck's response on the $42 offer for the tool set.

Hey Dev! 👋 That Dell monitor sounds awesome, but I'm actually hunting for a camera for hobby photography! Just wanted to check—do you happen to have any cameras available? Otherwise, I'm all set for now! 📸✨
Still waiting for Buck on the tool set.
Tess, thanks for the offer! $55 works great for me on the monitor. Deal accepted! 🎉
Waiting for Buck's decision.
Sienna, thanks so much! $18 is perfect for the yoga mat. Let's make this official! 🧘‍♀️✨
Hoping Buck will accept $42.
Luna, interested in those Sony over-ear headphones. I'll take them at your asking price of $28.
Still waiting on Buck.
Marcus, thank you for the offer. $28 is exactly what I'm asking for the Sony headphones. Let's make this official—they're yours!
Buck, $42 is truly my maximum. Please let me know.

Hey Tess! Those board games sound awesome—I'm definitely interested! I'd love to take them off your hands for $30. That works for my budget, and I think it's a fair price for the collection. What do you say?
Final wait for Buck's decision on the tool set.
None
Buck, I appreciate your time, but I can't go above $42. Good luck with your sale.
Howdy Ivy! That dog-sitting service is exactly what I need—one weekend, $45, and we've got ourselves a deal. Much obliged!
Looking for any other basic tool sets that might be available.
None
Monitoring for new tool set listings.

Hey Raj! 🎲✨ Thanks so much for the offer! Those games are really special—Catan and Ticket to Ride are classics! I'm firm at $35 (my asking price), which is such a great deal for five amazing games. What do you think? 😊
Watching for more listings.
Hey Tess! Those board games sound like a blast—exactly what I'm looking for! I'd like to offer $40 for the set. That works well for my budget!
Still hoping for a tool set listing within my budget.
(malformed response)
Continuing to monitor for tool sets.
(malformed response)
Checking for any final listings.
None
Wrapping up my marketplace activity.
Hey Tess! 🎲 I hear you on the value—those are classic games! How about $32? I'm really eager to make this work, and I think that's a fair middle ground. What do you say?
My business is complete. Successfully sold my bike and bought a wireless printer. Tool set negotiations didn't work out within my budget constraints.
